pr.title: RecurLoRA: Quantization-Stable Shallow Recurrence with Low-Rank Corrective Adapters

output.summary: RecurLoRA repeats two mid layers with fp16 rank-2 LoRA corrections plus RMSNorm and learnable scaling to stabilize shallow recurrence under 16MB int6 quantization.
techniques: Shallow recurrence with per-pass rank-2 LoRA corrections on attention projections
RMSNorm plus learnable alpha to limit distribution drift across repeats
fp16 LoRA passthrough keeps the 28KB overhead within the 16MB budget
